title: Model capability registry (v2 — Facet A)
description: Formalizes process/model-capability-registry.md. A registry instance maps a profile id to the per-model capability facts the capability gate validates a role's (harness × provider × model) binding against (plan §4.1 Facet A; charter tooling.<role>.capability_ref). Provider/model lock reality: claude_code↔anthropic, codex↔openai are provider-locked; the headless OpenAI-compatible endpoint is the adapter that unlocks deepseek/moonshot/openai for judgment/reasoning roles. structured_output_tier + reasoning_tier are the load-bearing fields the capability requirements table keys on (process/role-configuration-contract.md). NON-NORMATIVE thresholds; adopters tune with rationale (Constitution §7.0).

last_updated.description: ISO date the registry was last refreshed against provider docs.

models.description: Map of capability-profile id (the value of charter tooling.<role>.capability_ref) → model capability record.

tier.description: Reliability tier. A role's requirement is satisfied iff the model's tier is >= the required tier (unsupported < low < medium < high).

provider.description: Provider id. Common: anthropic | openai | deepseek | moonshot. Free-form to allow new providers without a schema bump.

model.description: Provider model id, e.g. claude-opus-4-8, gpt-5, deepseek-v4-pro, moonshot-v1-128k.

context_window.description: Maximum context window in tokens. The capability gate compares against a role's context requirement.

tool_use.description: Whether the model supports native tool/function calling. A role that requires file edits or tool-use (Dev) needs true on a coding-agent harness.

structured_output_tier.description: Reliability of schema-valid / JSON-mode output. Verdict-emitting roles (review, acceptance) require >= medium; the engine NEVER lowers the verdict-schema bar for a weaker model (model-agnostic verdict invariant).

reasoning_tier.description: Reasoning / judgment capability tier. Judgment roles (acceptance) and planning (deliver) key on this.

endpoint_kind.description: How the model is reached. native = provider's first-party harness (claude_code/codex). openai_compatible = reachable via the headless adapter's OpenAI-compatible endpoint (unlocks deepseek/moonshot/openai for API-only roles).

harness_compat.description: Harnesses that can drive this (provider, model). Coding-agent harnesses (claude_code/codex/kimi/aider/cursor) are required for file-editing roles; headless (OpenAI-compatible API) suits pure-API judgment/reasoning roles. Keep in sync with the validator's _NATIVE_HARNESS_PROVIDER / _CODING_AGENT_HARNESSES.

cost.description: Per-million-token pricing (informational; budget tracking is charter.budget). Subscription-billed agents may have null values.

calibratable.description: Whether this model is eligible to back a calibration-gated judgment role (Acceptance) per Constitution §3.6. The capability gate refuses judgment roles on non-calibratable models.
